title: Yedhedho Pennae Lyrics Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai
stanzas:
en kaatril indru
un swasam thedi
indreno vinnodu parakkiren

en aasai ninaipadhu yeralam
endralum ennidam mozhi illai
pen aasai maraipadhu earalam
adhai ellam sollida vazhi illai

oh anbe en anbe
en idhayathai
un kaiyil naan thandhen
oor kadidhathai

un idhayam en vasathil
en idhayam un thadathil
iruvarume oor idathil
kaadhalenum kalavarathil

anbe en nyabagam theendi
un thookkam tholaindhadha
ange en yosanai vandhe
un yekam  malindhadha

kadhalin kaigalil
bommaiyaai udaigiren
kaayangal unmaiyil
inbam thaan arigiren

un idhayam en vasathil
en idhayam un thadathil

veveru vergalil pirandhom
nam kadhal inaiyuma
manamondri serndhidum thoodhu
mei kadhal irakkuma

kaalathai kadhalal
vendru naam vaazhuvom
kaadhale unmaiyil anbena paaduvom

un idhayam en vasathil
en idhayam un thadathil

en kaatril indru

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yedhedho Pennae'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings of love and desire, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who is the singer of 'Yedhedho Pennae'?

The song is sung by Sathya Prakash, known for his melodious voice and emotional delivery.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Yedhedho Pennae' was composed by GV PrakashKumar, who is renowned for his innovative musical style.

When was 'Yedhedho Pennae' released?

The song was released on August 26, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Yedhedho Pennae', the protagonist expresses his deep yearning for love, beautifully conveyed through Sathya Prakash's emotive vocals. The song serves as a poignant reflection of the complexities of romantic relationships, highlighting moments of joy and sorrow. Set against the backdrop of Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai, it captures the essence of longing and desire, evoking a sense of nostalgia. The lyrical depth and soothing melody make it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's romantic repertoire.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yedhedho Pennae from the movie Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai is a mesmerizing romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With Sathya Prakash's soulful voice and Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love. The enchanting composition by GV PrakashKumar adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Oh girl, since you came, I feel like I'm floating in water.
Today, in my breeze, I search for your breath and I soar with the sky.
Even if my desires are endless, I have no words to express them. The girl's wishes are lost, and there's no way to say all that.
Oh my love, my love, I have given my heart to your hands, which is a treasure of the town.
Your heart is in my place, my heart is in your space, both of us are in the love's embrace in this town.
My love, searching for your memory, I lost my sleep, and there my thoughts came, blending with your essence.
In the hands of love, I have become a puppet, and I know that true happiness is in your reality.
Your heart is in my place, my heart is in your space.
We were born in different worlds, but does our love connect us? Does the heart unite us in true love?
With love, we will live through time, and in love, we will sing the truth.
Your heart is in my place, my heart is in your space.
Oh girl, since you came, I feel like I'm floating in water.
Today, in my breeze, I search for your breath and I soar with the sky.
Even if my desires are endless, I have no words to express them. The girl's wishes are lost, and there's no way to say all that.
